title: Black Pine Wood Photo Frame 5x7 inch (13x18 cm) with Shatterproof Acrylic Glass | Modern 5 x 7 inch (13 x 18 cm) Wooden Picture Frame
features: 🇪🇺 Made in the EU – Our wooden picture frames are sourced from Europe and made from high-quality pinewood. Ideal for preserving and sharing precious memories.
🪵 High Quality Craftsmanship – Our frames are crafted from the finest pine wood by skilled artisans. We combine natural beauty with durability to preserve your memories.

🖼️🖼️ Compact Size 13 x 18 cm: No memory is too small and every precious moment should be captured in a beautiful frame. The 13 x 18 cm photo frame with a profile width of 14.8 x 19.8 cm and a profile depth of 13 mm and 12 mm is designed to perfectly display your memories and become the focal point of any room where you decide to hang it.
⬛ Elegant Black Finish - Enhance your precious memories with our black frame and add a special touch of elegance to any room.
📐 Horizontal and Vertical Wall Mounting – Thanks to the clips on the back, our frames can be hung both horizontally and vertically, so you can display your favorite pictures anywhere in the room

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Clean the acrylic glass with a soft, lint-free cloth and a mild glass cleaner. Dust the wooden frame regularly and gently clean it with a soft, damp cloth. Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive materials.
